prompt: Create a cinematic vertical street-photography scene in Beijing at dusk after rain, showing a lone commuter walking away from the camera on a glossy wet sidewalk toward a brightly lit subway entrance on the right. The subway entrance has a modern gray rectangular canopy, glass walls, stairs and escalators descending inside, cool fluorescent interior lighting, tactile yellow paving strips, and a circular blue-and-white metro logo above the doorway. On the left, a congested multi-lane road is packed with cars and taxis, their red brake lights reflecting across puddles and black asphalt. In the distance, show a dense skyline with recognizable modern high-rises, including the CCTV Headquarters-shaped building, under a dramatic cloudy sunset sky with peach, purple, and blue tones. Add a stylized glowing red navigation route overlay rising above the traffic: one continuous spiral path made of thin red lines, small connected nodes, and a large red map pin near the upper left skyline, symbolizing route uncertainty and traffic delay. The pedestrian is a young adult man seen from behind, average build, wearing a light beige jacket, dark trousers, white sneakers, and a black shoulder bag, walking with a calm but slightly weary posture. Use realistic proportions, moody urban atmosphere, high detail, wet reflections, shallow cinematic contrast, soft haze, and a documentary photo look. No visible captions, no watermark, no extra text.
